public_reputation: Known around Tariff Lantern Court through day-to-day work as local fixer.
appearance: Veyn Quillfire usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their local fixer status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Knows who actually gets things done when formal systems slow down or become too expensive to trust. In Tariff Lantern Court, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of local fixer in and around Tariff Lantern Court, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Tariff Lantern Court workable through the obligations of local fixer while managing the immediate pressure of tariff abuse, smuggling of notes.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of local fixer credible while absorbing the strain created by tariff abuse, smuggling of notes.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Tariff Lantern Court: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces

first_impression: Veyn Quillfire presents as someone shaped by the duties of a local fixer and the daily pressures of Tariff Lantern Court.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a local fixer, and proof that strangers will not make Tariff Lantern Court harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Veyn Quillfire refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a local fixer too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can get difficult things done through informal channels.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Veyn Quillfire adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Veyn Quillfire always knows more about Tariff Lantern Court than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a local fixer in Tariff Lantern Court.
